data.instruction: Change 'AI Fit Matrix Tool' to 'AI Fit Assessment Matrix tool' to ensure consistency with the tools_summary and system_requirements sections.
Change 'RFP Submission Templates' to 'Responsible AI template library' to ensure consistency with the tools_summary and system_requirements sections.

The 'Knowledge Management System' is listed in tools_summary but not referenced in any process step. Reference it in the appropriate step (e.g., Step 6 for archiving) or remove it from the tools_summary.
